One Wallet, Infinite Possibilities

Enable Your Customers to Effortlessly Transact Using Virtual Assets

Our advanced blockchain-based Wallets solution enables you to provide blockchain-based wallets to your customers allowing them to transact using virtual assets. Issuers gain access to a sophisticated centralised portal for efficient management, tracking, and gaining valuable insights.

Connect Wallet
Claim
Migrate
Connect Manually

A Symphony of Technology and Trust

Compliance

Ensure operations adhere to major blockchain protocols, providing a safe and compliant environment for users.

Versatile Wallet Integration

Offer your clients a comprehensive  user-friendly blockchain-powered wallet capable of supporting a diverse range  of virtual assets.

Blockchain-Enhanced Security

Utilise the power of blockchain technology for secure transactions with e-KYC for user registration.

Sophisticated Issuer Portal

Gain strategic insights with a centralised management system designed to track and analyse transactions.

White-Label Solutions

Customise our dashboards to align with your brand, offering a seamless extension of your existing applications.

Compliance

Versatile Wallet Integration

Offer your clients a comprehensive  user-friendly blockchain-powered wallet capable of supporting a diverse range  of virtual assets.

Elevate Your Brand with WadzPay's White-Labelled Wallet Application

Our blockchain-based wallet is designed to blend seamlessly with your brand, offering a personalised touch to your offerings. This customisable platform not only serves your clients' transactional needs but also reinforces your brand identity and loyalty.

Issuer Portal

Your Strategic Command Centre

WadzPay’s Issuer Portal is an invaluable tool for financial institutions and innovative businesses, providing a comprehensive overview of all wallet activities made within their ecosystem. Understand user behaviour and transaction trends within your network to make better strategic decisions.

Benefits at a Glance

Amplify Existing Platforms

Seamlessly integrate virtual assets alongside fiat currencies. Enrich your offerings without a complete overhaul.

Enhanced User Control

Empower your clients with full control over their holdings, centralising payments in a single, accessible wallet application.

Real-Time Management

Enable users to monitor and manage virtual asset-based transactions in real-time, fostering transparency and user confidence.

Increased Engagement

Provide a streamlined experience for your customers with our intuitive platform. Improve user engagement and wallet share.  

Strategic
Oversight

Use detailed insights into user behavior and transaction trends to improve strategy and decision-making.

Ready to Lead with Blockchain-Based Innovation?

Elevate your experience with our Wallets solution. Become a beacon of innovation in both the traditional and virtual asset-based transaction landscape.

Get Started
